name: Infor CloudSuite API
what_it_does: Infor CloudSuite REST API for industry-specific enterprise resource planning platform. Enables AI agents to interact with Infor's CloudSuite applications (M3, LN, SunSystems, CloudSuite Industrial) for manufacturing, distribution, and service verticals. Supports operations management, financials, supply chain, and industry-specific workflows via the Infor ION API gateway.
use_cases: Managing production orders and shop floor operations from manufacturing automation agents
Processing financials and GL entries from accounting integration agents
Tracking inventory and distribution from supply chain management agents
Integrating Infor ERP data into BI and analytics platforms via ION API agents
not_for: SMB without complex multi-module ERP requirements
Companies not using Infor M3, LN, SunSystems, or CloudSuite products
best_when: An enterprise manufacturing, distribution, or service company using Infor CloudSuite wants AI agents to automate ERP operations and integrate Infor data across business systems via the ION API gateway.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: ERP operations across linked modules can cascade. Infor ION API gateway architecture adds complexity. Cloud vs multi-tenant vs on-prem deployments have different API behaviors.

auth.notes: Infor uses OAuth 2.0 via the Infor ION API gateway with client credentials. All Infor CloudSuite APIs go through ION as a middleware. OAuth scopes control access to specific CloudSuite services.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise licensing with Koch Industries backing
pricing.paid_tiers: Enterprise annual contracts per user and module; pricing negotiated
pricing.notes: Koch Industries-owned enterprise ERP company. Pricing is enterprise-negotiated. API access through ION gateway included with CloudSuite subscription.

performance.rate_limits: ION API gateway has rate limits; varies by deployment and contract

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: ERP operations across financials, manufacturing, and distribution can cascade
No public MCP server — all APIs go through ION API gateway, adding architectural complexity
ION API gateway requires separate configuration and credentials from ERP credentials
Multiple CloudSuite products (M3, LN, SunSystems) have completely different data models
Documentation is product-version-specific — ensure you have docs for the right CloudSuite version
Koch Industries-owned — enterprise-tier support and implementation required
agent_readiness.security_notes: FINANCIAL RISK: Full ERP access via ION gateway. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2 scopes via ION. Enterprise-only with limited public documentation.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise ERP financial and operational data via ION gateway. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. Enterprise-only.
